name: Incident Triage Coach Workflow (FSI Brazil)
serviceNowSurface: Now Assist for ITSM domain skill orchestrated inside Agent Workspace, with Flow Designer for any write action
trigger: Incident created or updated and state in (1=New, 2=In Progress) and Tier 1 ownership
businessOutcome: Provide the Tier 1 analyst with a triage panel that suggests category, assignment group, top KB articles, and a summary, so the human can act in two minutes instead of seven, without any auto-action on credit-related cases.
steps: Read incident fields with PII fields masked client-side before sending to the model.
Run PII and credit-data heuristic; if hit, set guardian_flag = true and route to Guardian sensitive-topic check.
Call Now Assist Resolution Suggestion against the itsm-resolution KB scope; capture top three with confidence.
Call Now Assist Incident Summarization for a one-paragraph hand-off note.
Render the triage panel inside Agent Workspace with citations, confidence, and a clear escalate-to-human button.
Log the suggestion event to sn_aia_execution_* with prompt, response, user, and timestamp.
On analyst acceptance, write the chosen category and assignment_group via Flow Designer subflow with approval policy.
approvalPoints: Before any state change on credit-related incidents
Before promoting any KB scope expansion from sub-prod to prod
Before turning on Auto-close behaviour on any category
failureStates: Now Assist domain skill returns no suggestion above the confidence floor: panel falls back to manual triage and logs a low-confidence event.
Guardian sensitive-topic filter blocks the prompt: panel surfaces a sanitized version and asks the analyst to proceed manually.
KB scope returns zero results: panel marks the incident as KB-gap candidate for the Knowledge Curator backlog.
auditNotes: All AI events recorded to sn_aia_execution_* and reconciled with sys_gen_ai_log_metadata weekly.
Quarterly review board (Platform + Risk + Service Desk lead) signs off on precision and credit-burn metrics.
Owner of record: a named Service Desk Manager (CPF and email). Reassignment plan in place if owner changes.
tests: Empty short_description returns a clarification request and zero suggestions.
Synthetic credit-dispute incident triggers guardian_flag and blocks any auto-action.
Resolution Suggestion precision on the 100-incident gold set exceeds 70 percent.
Latency p95 of the panel below 4 seconds end-to-end on sub-prod with prod-equivalent volume.
Audit log retrieval rehearsal completes within 24 hours.
